heading: Statement of purpose
label: 4201 Statement of purpose
text: The purpose of this chapter is to perpetuate healthy populations of African elephants.
notes: Short Title of 2007 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 110–132, § 1121 Stat. 1360Dec. 6, 2007“This Act [amending sections 4211, 4245, 5304, and 5306 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Multinational Species Conservation Funds Reauthorization Act of 2007’.”

Short Title of 2002 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 107–111, § 1115 Stat. 2095Jan. 8, 2002“This Act [enacting , amending sections 4211, 4212, and 4244 to 4246 of this title, and repealing ] may be cited as the ‘African Elephant Conservation Reauthorization Act of 2001’.”section 4214 of this titlesection 4243 of this title

Short Title of 1998 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–217, § 1112 Stat. 911Aug. 5, 1998“This Act [amending ] may be cited as the ‘African Elephant Conservation Reauthorization Act of 1998’.”section 4245 of this title

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–478, title II, § 2001102 Stat. 2315Oct. 7, 1988“This title [enacting this chapter and amending ] may be cited as the ‘African Elephant Conservation Act’.”section 1538 of this title

Reporting Requirements, , , provided that:Pub. L. 118–159, div. E, title LIII, § 5308138 Stat. 2446Dec. 23, 2024“(a).—Reports to CongressAnnually, the Secretary of the Interior shall submit to the appropriate committees of Congress a report on the implementation of—“(1)the African Elephant Conservation Act ( et seq.);16 U.S.C. 4201“(2)the Asian Elephant Conservation Act of 1997 ( et seq.);16 U.S.C. 4261“(3)the Rhinoceros and Tiger Conservation Act of 1994 ( et seq.);16 U.S.C. 5301“(4)the Great Ape Conservation Act of 2000 ( et seq.); and16 U.S.C. 6301“(5)the Marine Turtle Conservation Act of 2004 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 6601“(b).—RequirementsA report submitted under subsection (a) shall include—“(1)a list of all awards issued each year under the applicable Act;“(2)the total monetary amount issued to each award recipient;“(3)the name of each award recipient organization;“(4)the country where each award will be implemented; and“(5)a description of the projects to be completed and completed under each award.”
